pod-crash.title: API Pod CrashLoopBackOff
pod-crash.description: Production alert: pod api-server-7d9f in namespace production is CrashLoopBackOff. High CPU on node-01. Service degraded.

disk-pressure.title: Node Disk Pressure Critical
disk-pressure.description: Alert: node-02 disk usage at 97%. Kubernetes scheduling new pods is failing with DiskPressure taint. Applications may crash.

tf-drift.title: Terraform Infrastructure Drift
tf-drift.description: CI pipeline detected Terraform state drift: S3 bucket mlops-model-registry-bucket-prod-xyz has unexpected configuration changes. Versioning disabled, public access unblocked.
